message:
feat(ftui-pty): add ICH, DCH, ECH, IL, DL, REP, DECSTR to VirtualTerminal (bd-du0i8)

Add 7 missing CSI handlers to the VirtualTerminal reference model:
- CSI @ (ICH): insert characters at cursor
- CSI P (DCH): delete characters at cursor
- CSI X (ECH): erase characters without moving cursor
- CSI L (IL): insert lines at cursor row (was stub)
- CSI M (DL): delete lines at cursor row (was stub)
- CSI b (REP): repeat last printed character
- CSI ! p (DECSTR): soft reset style/scroll region

Move ICH fixture from known_mismatches.tsv to supported differential
fixtures. Add 7 new supported differential test fixtures exercising
all new handlers. All tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
